lines.english: Lesson 50
lines.chinese: 第50课
lines.raw: Lesson 50 | 第50课

lines.english: New Year resolutions
lines.chinese: 新年决心
lines.raw: New Year resolutions | 新年决心

lines.english: What marked the end of the writer's New Year resolutions?
lines.chinese: 是什么标志着作者的新年决心的终结？
lines.raw: What marked the end of the writer's New Year resolutions? | 是什么标志着作者的新年决心的终结？

lines.english: The New Year is a time for resolutions.
lines.chinese: 新年是制定决心的时候。
lines.raw: The New Year is a time for resolutions. | 新年是制定决心的时候。

lines.english: Mentally, at least, most of us could compile formidable lists of 'dos' and 'don'ts'.
lines.chinese: 至少在心理上，我们大多数人都能列出一长串“该做”和“不该做”的事情。
lines.raw: Mentally, at least, most of us could compile formidable lists of 'dos' and 'don'ts'. | 至少在心理上，我们大多数人都能列出一长串“该做”和“不该做”的事情。

lines.english: The same old favourites recur year in year out with monotonous regularity.
lines.chinese: 那些老掉牙的旧习惯年复一年地以单调的规律重现。
lines.raw: The same old favourites recur year in year out with monotonous regularity. | 那些老掉牙的旧习惯年复一年地以单调的规律重现。

lines.english: We resolve to get up earlier each morning, eat less,
lines.chinese: 我们下决心每天早起，少吃，
lines.raw: We resolve to get up earlier each morning, eat less, | 我们下决心每天早起，少吃，

lines.english: find more time to play with the children, do a thousand and one jobs about the house,
lines.chinese: 抽出更多时间陪孩子们玩，做成千上万件家务，
lines.raw: find more time to play with the children, do a thousand and one jobs about the house, | 抽出更多时间陪孩子们玩，做成千上万件家务，

lines.english: be nice to people we don't like, drive carefully, and take the dog for a walk every day.
lines.chinese: 对不喜欢的人和善，小心驾驶，以及每天遛狗。
lines.raw: be nice to people we don't like, drive carefully, and take the dog for a walk every day. | 对不喜欢的人和善，小心驾驶，以及每天遛狗。

lines.english: Past experience has taught us that certain accomplishments are beyond attainment.
lines.chinese: 过去的经验告诉我们，有些成就是无法实现的。
lines.raw: Past experience has taught us that certain accomplishments are beyond attainment. | 过去的经验告诉我们，有些成就是无法实现的。

lines.english: If we remain inveterate smokers, it is only because we have so often experienced the frustration that results from failure.
lines.chinese: 如果我们仍是老烟枪，那只是因为我们屡次体验了失败带来的挫折感。
lines.raw: If we remain inveterate smokers, it is only because we have so often experienced the frustration that results from failure. | 如果我们仍是老烟枪，那只是因为我们屡次体验了失败带来的挫折感。

lines.english: Most of us fail in our efforts at self-improvement because our schemes are too ambitious and we never have time to carry them out.
lines.chinese: 我们大多数人在自我改进方面都失败了，因为我们的计划过于雄心勃勃，我们根本没有时间去实施。
lines.raw: Most of us fail in our efforts at self-improvement because our schemes are too ambitious and we never have time to carry them out. | 我们大多数人在自我改进方面都失败了，因为我们的计划过于雄心勃勃，我们根本没有时间去实施。

lines.english: We also make the fundamental error of announcing our resolutions to everybody
lines.chinese: 我们还犯了一个根本性的错误，那就是向所有人宣布我们的决心，
lines.raw: We also make the fundamental error of announcing our resolutions to everybody | 我们还犯了一个根本性的错误，那就是向所有人宣布我们的决心，

lines.english: so that we look even more foolish when we slip back into our bad old ways.
lines.chinese: 这样当我们故态复萌时，就会显得更加愚蠢。
lines.raw: so that we look even more foolish when we slip back into our bad old ways. | 这样当我们故态复萌时，就会显得更加愚蠢。

lines.english: Aware of these pitfalls, this year I attempted to keep my resolutions to myself.
lines.chinese: 意识到这些陷阱，今年我试图把我的决心藏在心里。
lines.raw: Aware of these pitfalls, this year I attempted to keep my resolutions to myself. | 意识到这些陷阱，今年我试图把我的决心藏在心里。

lines.english: I limited myself to two modest ambitions: to do physical exercises every morning and to read more of an evening.
lines.chinese: 我只限制自己两个适度的抱负：每天早上做体育锻炼，晚上多读书。
lines.raw: I limited myself to two modest ambitions: to do physical exercises every morning and to read more of an evening. | 我只限制自己两个适度的抱负：每天早上做体育锻炼，晚上多读书。

lines.english: An all-night party on New Year's Eve provided me with a good excuse for not carrying out either of these new resolutions on the first day of the year,
lines.chinese: 新年前夜的通宵派对给了我一个很好的借口，让我在新年第一天没有执行这两项新决心，
lines.raw: An all-night party on New Year's Eve provided me with a good excuse for not carrying out either of these new resolutions on the first day of the year, | 新年前夜的通宵派对给了我一个很好的借口，让我在新年第一天没有执行这两项新决心，

lines.english: but on the second, I applied myself assiduously to the task.
lines.chinese: 但在第二天，我勤奋地投入到这项任务中。
lines.raw: but on the second, I applied myself assiduously to the task. | 但在第二天，我勤奋地投入到这项任务中。

lines.english: The daily exercises lasted only eleven minutes and I proposed to do them early in the morning before anyone had got up.
lines.chinese: 每天的锻炼只持续11分钟，我打算在大家起床之前一大早做。
lines.raw: The daily exercises lasted only eleven minutes and I proposed to do them early in the morning before anyone had got up. | 每天的锻炼只持续11分钟，我打算在大家起床之前一大早做。

lines.english: The self-discipline required to drag myself out of bed 11 minutes earlier than usual was considerable.
lines.chinese: 要比平时早11分钟把自己从床上拽起来，需要的自律性是相当大的。
lines.raw: The self-discipline required to drag myself out of bed 11 minutes earlier than usual was considerable. | 要比平时早11分钟把自己从床上拽起来，需要的自律性是相当大的。

lines.english: Nevertheless, I managed to creep down into the living room for two days before anyone found me out.
lines.chinese: 尽管如此，我还是设法偷偷溜到客厅里去了两天，才被人发现。
lines.raw: Nevertheless, I managed to creep down into the living room for two days before anyone found me out. | 尽管如此，我还是设法偷偷溜到客厅里去了两天，才被人发现。

lines.english: After jumping about on the carpet and twisting the human frame into uncomfortable positions,
lines.chinese: 在地毯上跳来跳去，把身体扭曲成不舒服的姿势之后，
lines.raw: After jumping about on the carpet and twisting the human frame into uncomfortable positions, | 在地毯上跳来跳去，把身体扭曲成不舒服的姿势之后，

lines.english: I sat down at the breakfast table in an exhausted condition.
lines.chinese: 我筋疲力尽地坐到早餐桌旁。
lines.raw: I sat down at the breakfast table in an exhausted condition. | 我筋疲力尽地坐到早餐桌旁。

lines.english: It was this that betrayed me.
lines.chinese: 就是这个把我出卖了。
lines.raw: It was this that betrayed me. | 就是这个把我出卖了。

lines.english: The next morning the whole family trooped in to watch the performance.
lines.chinese: 第二天早上，全家人都跑进来观看表演。
lines.raw: The next morning the whole family trooped in to watch the performance. | 第二天早上，全家人都跑进来观看表演。

lines.english: That was really unsettling but I fended off the taunts and jibes of the family good-humouredly and soon everybody got used to the idea.
lines.chinese: 这确实让人不安，但我还是好脾气地抵挡住了家人的嘲讽和揶揄，很快大家就习惯了。
lines.raw: That was really unsettling but I fended off the taunts and jibes of the family good-humouredly and soon everybody got used to the idea. | 这确实让人不安，但我还是好脾气地抵挡住了家人的嘲讽和揶揄，很快大家就习惯了。

lines.english: However, my enthusiasm waned.
lines.chinese: 然而，我的热情消退了。
lines.raw: However, my enthusiasm waned. | 然而，我的热情消退了。

lines.english: The time I spent at exercises gradually diminished.
lines.chinese: 我花在锻炼上的时间逐渐减少。
lines.raw: The time I spent at exercises gradually diminished. | 我花在锻炼上的时间逐渐减少。

lines.english: Little by little the eleven minutes fell to zero.
lines.chinese: 渐渐地，那11分钟变成了零。
lines.raw: Little by little the eleven minutes fell to zero. | 渐渐地，那11分钟变成了零。

lines.english: By January 10th, I was back to where I had started from.
lines.chinese: 到了1月10日，我又回到了起点。
lines.raw: By January 10th, I was back to where I had started from. | 到了1月10日，我又回到了起点。

lines.english: I argued that if I spent less time exhausting myself at exercises in the morning,
lines.chinese: 我辩解说，如果早上少花点时间在锻炼上把自己搞得精疲力尽，
lines.raw: I argued that if I spent less time exhausting myself at exercises in the morning, | 我辩解说，如果早上少花点时间在锻炼上把自己搞得精疲力尽，

lines.english: I would keep my mind fresh for reading when I got home from work.
lines.chinese: 那么我下班回家时，头脑会更清醒，可以用来阅读。
lines.raw: I would keep my mind fresh for reading when I got home from work. | 那么我下班回家时，头脑会更清醒，可以用来阅读。

lines.english: Resisting the hypnotizing effect of television,
lines.chinese: 抵制住电视的催眠作用，
lines.raw: Resisting the hypnotizing effect of television, | 抵制住电视的催眠作用，

lines.english: I sat in my room for a few evenings with my eyes glued to a book.
lines.chinese: 有几个晚上，我坐在房间里，眼睛紧盯着一本书。
lines.raw: I sat in my room for a few evenings with my eyes glued to a book. | 有几个晚上，我坐在房间里，眼睛紧盯着一本书。

lines.english: One night, however, feeling cold and lonely, I went downstairs and sat in front of the television pretending to read.
lines.chinese: 然而，有一天晚上，我感到又冷又寂寞，于是下楼坐在电视机前假装看书。
lines.raw: One night, however, feeling cold and lonely, I went downstairs and sat in front of the television pretending to read. | 然而，有一天晚上，我感到又冷又寂寞，于是下楼坐在电视机前假装看书。

lines.english: That proved to be my undoing, for I soon got back to my old bad habit of dozing off in front of the screen.
lines.chinese: 那被证明是我的失败，因为我很快又回到了在屏幕前打瞌睡的旧习惯。
lines.raw: That proved to be my undoing, for I soon got back to my old bad habit of dozing off in front of the screen. | 那被证明是我的失败，因为我很快又回到了在屏幕前打瞌睡的旧习惯。

lines.english: I still haven't given up my resolution to do more reading.
lines.chinese: 我还没有放弃多读书的决心。
lines.raw: I still haven't given up my resolution to do more reading. | 我还没有放弃多读书的决心。

lines.english: In fact, I have just bought a book entitled How to Read a Thousand Words a Minute.
lines.chinese: 事实上，我刚买了一本名为《如何一分钟阅读一千字》的书。
lines.raw: In fact, I have just bought a book entitled How to Read a Thousand Words a Minute. | 事实上，我刚买了一本名为《如何一分钟阅读一千字》的书。

lines.english: Perhaps it will solve my problem, but I just haven't had time to read it!
lines.chinese: 也许它能解决我的问题，但我就是没时间读它！
lines.raw: Perhaps it will solve my problem, but I just haven't had time to read it! | 也许它能解决我的问题，但我就是没时间读它！
